title: DimensionDisabler
description: DimensionDisabler allows administrators to enable/disable the Nether and the End, block portals, view chat messages, and has a customizable prefix.
body:
# 🌌 DimensionDisabler

DimensionDisabler is a lightweight yet powerful plugin for your Minecraft server that allows you to enable or disable the End and Nether.
With simple commands, you can temporarily or permanently block dimensions. Players will be automatically notified if they attempt to enter a disabled dimension.
Everything is fully configurable: chat prefix, messages, tab completion, permissions, and configuration settings.

## ✨ Features

- Enable/Disable End & Nether Dimensions
- Players receive chat messages when a dimension is blocked
- Fully configurable chat prefix
- Commands for admins to manage dimensions
- Tab completion for commands
- Configuration saves the state, even after a server restart
- Optimized for Minecraft 1.21+

## 🛠️ Commands
| Befehl                     | Description                           |
| -------------------------- | ------------------------------------- |
| `/dimension end on/off`    | Enables or disables the End           |
| `/dimension nether on/off` | Enables or disables the Nether        |

## 🔑 Permissions
| Permission         | Access                                |
| ------------------ | -------------------------------------- |
| `dimension.manage` | Allows managing the End & Nether |


## ⚙️ Configuration (config.yml)

```
prefix: "&8[&6Dimension&8] &7"
end-enabled: true
nether-enabled: true
```
- prefix: Chat prefix for messages
- end-enabled: true = End enabled, false = End disabled
- nether-enabled: true = Nether enabled, false = Nether disabled

## 📌 Installation

- Copy the JAR file to the plugins/ folder of your server.
- Start the server once to create the configuration.
- Adjust config.yml as needed.
- Use the commands: /dimension end on/off and /dimension nether on/off.
